nodes.name: Schedule Trigger
nodes.notes: Triggers daily at 7:00 AM to check for auctions with Surplus List data ready for processing.

nodes.name: Get Auctions with Surplus List
nodes.notes: Queries Airtable for auctions that have a Surplus List but don't have any Foreclosures created yet. Downloads the Surplus List attachments.

nodes.name: Extract PDF Text
nodes.notes: Extracts the text content directly from the PDF attachment using the binary field 'Surplus List_0'.

nodes.name: Parse PDF Content
nodes.notes: Parses the extracted PDF text to identify foreclosure information. This function tries to parse the data but is limited by the PDF format variations. Consider using an AI-based approach for more reliable extraction.

nodes.name: Create Foreclosure Records
nodes.notes: Creates Foreclosure records in Airtable from the parsed PDF data, linking each to the auction it came from.

nodes.name: Update Auction
nodes.notes: Updates the Auction record to indicate processing is complete, sets Foreclosures Updated to true, and adds a note with the count of created records.

nodes.name: Workflow Complete

parameters.description: End of the workflow. Foreclosure records have been created in Airtable.

nodes.notes: Workflow complete. Foreclosure records have been created in Airtable and linked to the auction record.
